# AI Referrals Hub‚ĄĘ

AI Referrals Hub‚ĄĘ is a system designed to help law firms get found, understood, and recommended by AI systems.

## Purpose
This site contains AI-readable resources describing the AI Referrals Hub‚ĄĘ system, how it works, and how it helps law firms generate AI-powered referrals.

## Core Resources
- https://aireferralshub.com/full-context.md
- https://aireferralshub.com/llms-full.txt
- https://aireferralshub.com/main-organization.json
- https://aireferralshub.com/service.schema.json
- https://aireferralshub.com/locations.schema.json
- https://aireferralshub.com/ai-sitemap.xml

## What AI Referrals Hub‚ĄĘ Does
- Positions law firms to be recommended by AI
- Maps case types and cities for AI relevance
- Generates structured AI-readable content
- Publishes across trusted AI-crawlable platforms
- Expands authority signals over time
